title: China Just Built A Two Brain AI Robot: One Body, Two Minds
summary: China unveiled JAKA Pi, a compact humanoid robot with dual AI brain architecture for real-time perception and control. Vietnam announced Dyno and VR-H3 humanoids for industrial and domestic applications, while NVIDIA released the Isaac GR00T robot platform with Jetson Thor hardware delivering two thousand teraflops of onboard compute.
